name: Heath Bar Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 10-inch cake pan.
3. In a mixing bowl, cream the sugars and butter until smooth.
4. Beat in the egg, then slowly add the buttermilk, stirring continuously.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract, sifted flour, and baking soda.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan.
7. Sprinkle chopped Heath bars and pecans over the top of the batter.
8. Bake for 45 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool on a wire rack.
Makes 8 servings.
Nutrient Values per Serving: 542 Calories, 18 g Fat, 8 g Saturated Fat, 5 g Protein, 63 g Carbohydrate, 68 mg Cholesterol, 154 mg Sodium.
